title: Concept Entity
description: Schema for validating concept.md YAML frontmatter. Concepts are domain-specific terms extracted from findings via the knowledge-extractor, providing shared vocabulary across the research project.

tags.description: Classification tags including entity type and domain category

dc:creator.description: Dublin Core creator field - skill that created the concept

dc:title.description: Dublin Core title field - concept name

dc:identifier.description: Dublin Core identifier - unique concept ID with 8-char hash

dc:created.description: Dublin Core creation timestamp - ISO 8601 format

definition.description: Brief definition of the domain concept

domain.description: Domain category this concept belongs to

finding_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to findings where this concept appears

megatrend_refs.description: Array of wikilinks to megatrends this concept relates to

mention_count.description: Number of times this concept appears across findings
